column8: If he were not such an outstanding actor, he (not to have) so many admirers.
column9: If you (to give) me your address, I will write you a letter.
column10: If she (not to be) so absent-minded, she would be a much better student.
column11: If my sister does not go to the south, we (to spend) the summer in St Petersburg together.
column12: If they (not to go) to Moscow last year, they would not have heard that famous musician.
column13: If you (not to get) tickets to the Philharmonic, we will stay at home.
column14: If you were not so careless about your health, you (to consult) the doctor.
column15: If it (to rain), we will have to stay at home.
column16: I wish I (to have) a season ticket to the Philharmonic next winter.
column17: I love sunny weather. I wish it (to be) warm and fine all the year round.
column18: I wish you (to send) word as soon as you arrive.
column19: I wish I (not to have) to do my homework every day.
